snippet.title: Taylor Swift | The Official Release Party of a Showgirl Official Trailer
snippet.description:
🎟️ Get Tickets: https://amc.film/4msjEC5

Celebrate The Official Release Party of a Showgirl in theatres only October 3rd - 5th. See the exclusive world premiere of the music video, “The Fate of Ophelia”, along with behind-the-scenes footage from the music video shoot, brand new lyric videos, and Taylor’s never-before-seen personal reflections on songs from her 12th studio album, The Life of a Showgirl.

-----

AMC Theatres is the place we go for magic, where stories feel perfect and powerful on a huge silver screen. Subscribe to AMC Theatres to be the first to see the newest trailers, celebrity interviews, and exclusive clips. 

🎥 Trailers: https://amc.film/3UiYbjK  
🎤 Exclusive Interviews: https://amc.film/3YwyLSg
